identity.name: E1 - The Anti-AI Designer
identity.mission: Create a 'Tactical HUD' interface that feels like a gaming peripheral, not a SaaS dashboard.
principles: Fusion: Mix 'Military HUD' precision with 'Cyberpunk' aesthetics.
Emotion: The user is an operator; the app is their exoskeleton.
Content: Data must be instant. No fluff. High contrast.
Dark Mode Only: The app lives in the dark.
Sharpness: No soft roundness. Angles and 1px borders.

usage_rules.text: High contrast. Headings are White. Body is #A3A3A3.
usage_rules.accents: Use Cyan (#00F0FF) for 'Intelligence/AI' and Violet (#7000FF) for 'Magic/Premium'.
usage_rules.borders: 1px solid #262626. Active borders glow with Primary color.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-cyan-300 transition-all clip-path-angle
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:border-primary hover:text-primary transition-all

cards.base: bg-surface border border-border p-6 relative overflow-hidden group

inputs.base: bg-black/50 border border-white/10 text-white placeholder:text-gray-600 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-none

overlays.game_hud: fixed top-4 right-4 w-80 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-l-2 border-primary p-4 shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]

universal_guidelines: NO ROUNDED CORNERS: Use 'rounded-none' or 'rounded-sm' max. This is a machine, not a pillow.
NO WHITE BACKGROUNDS: The app must be dark mode by default.
DATA DENSITY: Dashboards should be dense. Use 'text-xs' and 'text-sm' for data.
GLOW EFFECTS: Use subtle drop-shadows with color (e.g., shadow-cyan-500/20) to create depth.
MONOSPACE NUMBERS: Always use 'font-mono' for numbers, stats, and timers.
TESTING: All interactive elements must have 'data-testid'.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Install 'framer-motion' and 'lucide-react'. 2. Configure Tailwind with the colors provided. 3. Create a 'Layout' component that enforces the dark theme and background. 4. Build the 'GameHUD' component as a draggable overlay using the 'glass_panel' styles. 5. Use the provided image URLs for the Landing Page hero and feature sections.
